reason: Ready for review: ai-integration SKILL updated, ai-agent README rewritten, CHANGELOG [Unreleased] bullets added, security review filed, release-readiness checklist with 5 deferred follow-ups (#1509..#1513). Untracked WP07 review-cycle artifact left in place (WP07 is approved; not owned by WP09)

review.reference: Approved. Docs deliverables verified against checklist: SKILL.md adds agent-executor.md to refs + 'Running an agent' (CLI/HTTP/Extension subsections) + 'Where the code lives' table noting L5 route provider per post-FR-031 revision; AgentInterface/McpToolDefinition refs purged. README.md gives one-paragraph runtime description, Where to start (linked spec), Surfaces table (CLI/HTTP/SSE/Messenger/Scheduler), Extension points (#[AsAgentDefinition] + #[AsAgentTool]), Quality gates; no stale symbol refs. CHANGELOG [Unreleased] is Keep-a-Changelog shaped (Added/Changed/Removed), references #1496, covers ai-tools package, agent executor v1, ToolRegistry signature change, ADR-019, all four major deletions (AgentInterface, McpToolDefinition, packages/mcp/src/Tools/*, McpToolExecutor::accessCheck bypass + legacy ToolRegistry/AgentAuditLog VO). Security review covers HTTP/MCP/CLI/config-defaults; all findings Pass; C-010 env-var indirection, C-014 append-only audit, FR-033 initiator ownership documented; honest preamble disclosing manual pass (security-review slash skill not invocable from a subagent). Release-readiness checklist has all 10 SCs and all 15 NFRs (NFR-001 35ms, NFR-002 <1s, NFR-004 deferral cleanly attributed to #1512), 8 quality gates enumerated, all five follow-ups #1509-#1513 referenced consistently in both security doc and release-readiness, signed 2026-05-18. Three flagged caveats accepted: (1) manual security review — honest preamble; (2) composer verify tail not pasted — explicitly flagged for merging engineer pre-tag, acceptable as documented gap; (3) SC-007/NFR-004 scheduler-wiring deferral via #1512 — CLI commands ship, only cron auto-invocation deferred. All five GH issues verified OPEN. Mission closeout.
